message:
🌱 Add flatcar-container-linux: [RFE] OVHcloud documentation mission (#1332)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flatcar-container-linux-1453-rfe-ovhcloud-documentation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flatcar-container-linux: [RFE] OVHcloud documentation",
+    "description": "[RFE] OVHcloud documentation. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flatcar-container-linux deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flatcar-container-linux version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nhelm list -n flatcar-container-linux 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flatcar-container-linux installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flatcar-container-linux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flatcar-container-linux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl get configmap -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flatcar-container-linux\n```\n## Current situation\n\nOVHcloud is powered by OpenStack (for the virtual machines) but there is no documentation to show how to import and use Flatcar OpenStack images on OVH.\n\n## Impact\n\nIt's \"hard\" to get Flatcar running on OVH."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFE] OVHcloud documentation",
+        "description": "Hi, we use flatcar+terraform on OVH for quite some time.\n\nHere our implementation working in production\n```terraform\nresource \"openstack_images_image_v2\" \"flatcar\" {\n  for_each = var.os_image\n\n  name             = \"Flatcar ${each.value[\"arch\"]} - ${each.value[\"version\"]} ${each.value[\"release_channel\"]}\"\n  region           = var.region\n  image_source_url =\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade flatcar-container-linux to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade flatcar-container-linux:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade flatcar-container-linux flatcar-container-linux/flatcar-container-linux --namespace flatcar-container-linux\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux\nhelm list -n flatcar-container-linux\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flatcar-container-linux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flatcar-container-linux\nkubectl get events -n flatcar-container-linux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFE] OVHcloud documentation\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi, we use flatcar+terraform on OVH for quite some time.\n\nHere our implementation working in production\n```terraform\nresource \"openstack_images_image_v2\" \"flatcar\" {\n  for_each = var.os_image\n\n  name             = \"Flatcar ${each.value[\"arch\"]} - ${each.value[\"version\"]} ${each.value[\"release_channel\"]}\"\n  region           = var.region\n  image_source_url =",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flatcar-container-linux",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flatcar-container-linux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/flatcar/Flatcar/issues/1453",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/flatcar/Flatcar"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flatcar-container-linux installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:29:51.695Z",

+}
